examples: Most people dismiss colorblind people as having a minor problem with red and green.
After I finished at the end of the day, I found out my boss is red-green colorblind. FML.
Out of interest, does that logo look normal to anyone here/ is there anyone who’s colorblind here?
Ingrid Perri, a life coach in Melbourne, Australia, discovered she was mildly colorblind at age 47.
Other apps, such as HueVue and Colorblind Helper, assist with matching or harmonizing colors.
